payload.label: fireplace
payload.long_description: Close-up of a white painted wooden fireplace surround with rectangular panel moldings, a black metal firebox insert and a dark slate or tile hearth; the right side of the surround is edge-cropped and a nearby fabric curtain or column is visible — approximately 1.5 m from the camera.
